PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Duane Arruti (Nephew/Proposed Personal Representative) in pro per.

The Court addressed Mr. Arruti noting that he lives in New Mexico and inquired whether or not he'd hire an attorney to assist him in this matter. Mr. Arruti stated that the only assest is Marsha Lee's condo, that the condo is below market, that it is heavily governed by the Mayor's office in a below market program, that he is a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) in New Mexico, and that his Aunt (the Decedent) was also a CPA. The Court addressed limited authority versus full authority. Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court granted the petition with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $101,000.00. The Court stated that there would be no sale of the real property without Court authority.

At the request of Mr. Arruti, there was a second call of this matter. Mr. Arruti stated that he is the Trustee of his Aunt's Trust, that he was requesting that the Court grant him full authority, and that there are sufficient funds in the Trust to pay for the credit debt, additional expenses, etc. At the request of Mr. Arruti, the Court vacated it's prior order and then granted the petition with full authority ((subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $534,000.00.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
